case_title: GUILLERMO PALATTO VS. ELECTROLUX WARRANTY CORPORATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PALATTO, GUILLERMO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELECTROLUX WARRANTY CORPORATION $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,080.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
